sparql:

  ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) <= 1980 && YEAR(?end) >= 1980)
}

question: What is the title of the first Wheel of Time book
How many of the Ryanverse books were written by Tom Clancy
How many Academy Awards was won by the film The Matrix
What movie was directed by Shane black in the year 2005
sparql:
SELECT DISTINCT ?movieLabel WHERE {
  ?director rdfs:label "Shane Black" @en .
  ?movie wdt:P57 ?director ; wdt:P577 ?date .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?date) , "2005"))
  .
  ?movie rdfs:label ?movieLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?movieLabel) = "en")
}
